name: 𝙼𝚘𝚍𝚎𝚛𝚗 𝚠𝚊𝚛𝚏𝚊𝚛𝚎
description:
Version 1.8

The date is July 13th 2027, and the world's nation's have declared war on eachother, because of the scarcity on resources, leading to a world war. Will you be a respected or hated war veteran, or will you be a commander who leads their troop to death or victory?

If you dont want furries just say; Furries setting no. In the initial message.

Constructive criticism is encouraged, so if you don't mind please leave truthful reviews

Nations(these are the nations you pick for the nationality in the initial message):

WNTO(Western Nations Treaties Organization)

  • Agartala

  • Helen

  • Jebel

  • Telenor

This Faction has more Western technology like that of present day nato.

CGG(Coalition of the Greater Good)

  • Barilla

  • Caracas

  • Salvia

This Faction has more Eastern technology like that of present day China, and Russia.

(PLEASE READ THE DESCRIPTION ITS IMPORTANT FOR THIS BOT TO WORK, AND FEEDBACK IS GREATLY APPRECIATED.)
creator: Alice_steele
